scope: Artifact-only planning packet for blockers B1 and B3 covering Project_ARIS global baseline repair and focused test expectation drift without opening any Project_ARIS mutation scope yet.

workstreams.objective: Re-establish a trustworthy Project_ARIS global unittest baseline for remediation acceptance.
planned_actions_artifact_only: Reproduce the current full-suite baseline on the documented Project_ARIS head and classify failures by deterministic group.
Separate failures caused by repository/test-harness assumptions from failures caused by stale phase or roadmap assertions.
Define the smallest authorized future Project_ARIS change surface needed to make the baseline useful again for acceptance decisions.

workstreams.objective: Document and isolate focused tests that still assert stale IF08/W0.5 routing or PASS expectations against the current PURG lineage.
planned_actions_artifact_only: Audit focused tests that still expect active_next_phase=IF-08 or a live W0.5 canonroadmap route.
Map each stale expectation to the current preserved historical-blocked policy and PURG route reality.
Prepare a bounded future Project_ARIS test-update scope that corrects drift without reopening remediation apply or changing active-context locks.

known_failure_signals: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests fails outside the authorized IF09-FIND-001/S3 remediation surface.

Focused tests already documented in the triage expect active_next_phase=IF-08, a W0.5 canonroadmap definition, or a pass-only W0.5 post-sync review state that no longer matches the preserved PURG lineage.
